title: Undisguised's CPVP Pack
description: The BEST Crystal PvP Texture Pack!
body:
Undisguised's CPVP Pack

• Low Fire
• No Explosion Particles
• No Smoke Particles
• Less Totem Pop Particles
• Smaller Totem Pop Animation
• Quieter Fire Ticks
• Quieter Explosions
• Lower Utilities
• Hunger Bars on Food
• No Vignette
• Lower Grass
• Smaller Ender Pearls, End Crystals, Golden Apple And More!
